channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Illegal dumping of lime bikes continues, 23rd May
item.description:
This must stop! More bikes than the correct area. No lime staff to look after… just inappropriate illegal dumping of bikes. Why are lime not being fined? If I parked my car in spots not allowed I would be fined. Can we not start fining lime bikes please?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Charlotte Road, Shoreditch, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glad pane/screen smashed on grass, 23rd May
item.description:
This appeared in the past 2 days - totally smashed, very dangerous. Children play here and people walk their pets here. Grass common on Wynford way.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wynford Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chesterfield Grove-Street Sign dangerously bent, 23rd May
item.description:
The street sign, near the car wash is bent over. It nerds to be straightened as it could fall on pedestrians.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Chesterfield Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Thurlow Park Road SE21 outside property number 48, 23rd May
item.description:
Thurlow Park Road SE21 outside property number 48 Lambeth black plastic bin graffiti tagged. Yes Thurlow Park Road is a TfL road but Lambeth responsible for litter et al and so this bin is your property so graffiti is your issue. Please forward fixmystreet.com link to your contractor for reporting pin &, picture.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thurlow Park Road, Tulse Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light, 23rd May
item.description:
The light is not coming on
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Cloverdale Gardens, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Thurlow Park Road SE21 outside property number 68, 23rd May
item.description:
Thurlow Park Road SE21 outside property number 68 Lambeth black bin (with some kind of rough surface treatment on it) graffiti tagged. Yes Thurlow Park Road is a TfL road but Lambeth responsible for litter et al and so this bin is your property so graffiti is your issue. Please forward fixmystreet.com link to your contractor for reporting pin &, picture.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thurlow Park Road, Tulse Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter & fly tipping, 23rd May
item.description:
The litter in the Sun in the Sands pedestrian subways has accumulated over many weeks.. it used to get swept once a week. It in no way complies with the legal mrequirements of the Environmental Protection Act.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 1 Melbourne Grove-Flytipping, 23rd May
item.description:
Flytipped glass table, blocking the pavement and could shatter. Needs to be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Melbourne Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ashbourne Grove-Flytipping, 23rd May
item.description:
Coat on bike rack, has been there for over a week. Needs to be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Ashbourne Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 47 Melbourne Grove-Flytipping, 23rd May
item.description:
A large chair is blocking the pavement. It needs to be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 47, Melbourne Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Padestrian lights just east of Gospel Oak Station, 23rd May
item.description:
There is no immediate safety issue. The pedestrian lights are changing to red every 2 minutes, without anyone pushing the button.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32-34, Gordon House Road, Gospel Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: External building lights at Well Street not on at 9:45pm, 23rd May
item.description:
Lights in stairwells are on, light for external walkways on building ALL off. All other buildings have lights on. PLEASE FIX THIS! THE LIGHTS IN THIS BUILDING NEVER WORK!!!!!!
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Well Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Branches sticking out on footpath and school children have to go on a road to avoid it. It’s very dangerous, 23rd May
item.description:
It’s been the for ages please act asap

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Iron Mill Lane, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping at the bin by the bus stop, 23rd May
item.description:
The rubbish is baby nappies now strewn over the pavement by the bus stop.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warepoint Drive, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corner of Oppidans and Primrose Hill Rd, 23rd May
item.description:
Defective metal chamber cover at the corner of Oppidans Road and Primrose Hill Road, NW3. Cover is partially displaced, unstable and flexes significantly under load. It is not properly supported within its frame and appears at risk of collapse. Serious pedestrian safety hazard. Urgent inspection and replacement required.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oppidans Road, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on street, 23rd May
item.description:
Large fly tip and there are multiple all the way down the road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oulton Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glasses, 23rd May
item.description:
Broken glasses
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Haydon Street, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - smashed glass or panels / jagged metal edges on shelter

item.title: Abandoned vehicle d, 23rd May
item.description:
Causing an obstruction

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Saunders Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Metal bin required inside outer casing, 23rd May
item.description:
There is no metal bin with a black bag inside which means people at the bus stop throwing rubbish on the floor. Please provide a metal bin inside the green outer casing. This will dramatically reduce the litter here as it's right at the bus stop

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Brondesbury Villas- The Mallard Close Gates, 23rd May
item.description:
Soiled mattresses discarded at the gates of Mallard Close.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load
